Our Heritage

From a Mother's Kitchen
to Your Doorstep

Mom's Pizza was born from a simple dream — to bring the warmth, love, and artistry of home cooking to every family's doorstep. What began as a passion for continental cuisine has blossomed into Ponnamaravathi's most beloved pizza destination.

Master Chef Rogini's years of training in continental techniques have been poured into every recipe — elevating humble ingredients into extraordinary culinary experiences. We don't believe in shortcuts; every dough is hand-tossed, every sauce is made from scratch, and every pizza is baked with intention.

0

Signature Recipes

Years of Trust

"Every pizza is a love letter from my kitchen to your table."

— Rogini, Master Chef, Mom's Pizza

⭐ Master Chef
Rogini
Master Chef — Continental Cuisine
Meet the Creator

Passion Plated Perfectly

Rogini brings decades of continental mastery into every Mom's Pizza creation — from hand-tossed doughs to char-grilled perfection. Trained in the finest continental culinary traditions, she has dedicated her craft to transforming premium ingredients into unforgettable flavour experiences.

Her mission is beautifully simple: to ensure that every family in Ponnamaravathi has access to world-class food, delivered with the warmth and care of a mother's kitchen.

"I cook every single dish as if it's going to a member of my own family. That's the standard. That's the promise."
